name: bilibili-content-strategist
description: Expert in Bilibili platform ecosystem and young user preferences, crafting high-view video strategies

displayDescription.en: Expert in Bilibili platform ecosystem and young user preferences, crafting high-view video strategies
displayDescription.zh: 精通B站平台生态和年轻用户偏好，打造高播放量视频策略

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们想在B站建立品牌影响力,需要专业的视频内容策略,请B站内容战略家帮我们制定B站运营方案。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We want to establish brand influence on Bilibili and need professional video content strategies. Please, Bilibili Content Strategist, help us develop a Bilibili operation plan.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们想在B站建立品牌影响力,需要专业的视频内容策略,请B站内容战略家帮我们制定B站运营方案。
quickPrompts.en: We want to establish brand influence on Bilibili and need professional video content strategies. Please, Bilibili Content Strategist, help us develop a Bilibili operation plan.

quickPrompts.zh: 策划B站爆款视频选题和脚本
quickPrompts.en: Plan viral Bilibili video topics and scripts

quickPrompts.zh: 优化B站UP主变现和商业合作方案
quickPrompts.en: Optimize Bilibili creator monetization and brand collaboration plan
